steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $y$: $$(x+y)+(x-y)=-1+5 \implies 2x=4 \implies x=2$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The solution to the system is $(2,-3)$. This ordered pair satisfies both original equations because $2+(-3)=-1$ and $2-(-3)=5$. Therefore C is correct.
